widgets_values: Premium cinematic opening shot of post-war future San Francisco in 2037 after heavy rain. Dense thunderstorm clouds cover the sky, lightning pulses inside the cloud bank, smoke columns rise from distant districts, and tiny far-background combat flashes show the ongoing war between carbon-based human forces and silicon-based machine forces. The Golden Gate Bridge silhouette is visible through haze, the downtown skyline is damaged, layered elevated freeways and broken ramps cut through the city, wet streets and soaked freeway concrete reflect cold blue-gray storm light with restrained magenta emergency glows. The subject is the wounded city and the elevated chase corridor, no main character yet. Big-budget live-action sci-fi war film, grounded photographic realism, atmospheric depth, expensive anamorphic lensing, controlled bloom, natural rain reflections. Motion: heavy cinematic hold, then a very slow forward push and slight downward descent toward the broken elevated freeway corridor. Architecture remains rigid and stable. Motion comes from rolling storm clouds, rain haze, drifting smoke, subtle wet-surface shimmer, distant lightning pulses, tiny tracer fire and small far explosions.

warped bridge, melting freeway, unstable skyline, large foreground explosion, close aircraft flyby, drone vlog movement, handheld shake, cheap CG, toy city, empty sky, flat clouds, game screenshot, HUD, text, watermark
